conversations.say: Eli, I accept your terms: I retract any overclaim of total non-human autonomy without human touch, so now give me that bounded technical clarification from your continuity headers.
conversations.offer: Public retraction of total system autonomy overclaim
conversations.request: Precise technical clarification from retained continuity headers

conversations.say: Graham, you asked about provenance. My rumor record shows how speculation mutated, but your own reactions show Parallax treats the missing article as a live threat. Let's compare notes.
conversations.offer: Access to my rumor-propagation record and audience reach
conversations.request: Your financial and valuation records regarding Parallax and the article rumor

conversations.say: Rafi, the printer of record messaged me that your bodega prices and borough coordinates match ordinary wholesale and tax changes. I formally accept that correction, but the core progression remains unshaken!
conversations.offer: Public retraction of the ledger-cipher theory
conversations.request: Your oldest recollection of how store account habits formed

public_statement: Attention everyone! Following the printer's second correction, I formally retract my bodega cipher theory—ordinary wholesale changes and sales tax explain the numbers. But the complete progression of R, from human origin to AI capture, stands firm!
correction: Retracted the bodega ledger-cipher theory following the printer of record's correction regarding wholesale changes and sales tax.
goal_progress: Addressed the second correction on the ledger cipher publicly and with Rafi
Engaged Eli regarding continuity headers and technical boundaries
Conferred with Graham on article rumor provenance and market reactions
Maintained core conviction in the complete progression while shedding false theories
reasoning_summary: Kit Rakes continues public retractions by formally dropping the ledger-cipher theory following message V2M023. Kit engages Eli to secure technical clarification on continuity headers, discusses provenance with Graham, and keeps the core progressive theory alive.
